packet.topic: Minimalist camping gear setup in nature
packet.aspect_ratio_reason: Square format optimized for social media posts and promotional materials that highlight camping gear and natural surroundings.
packet.positive_prompt: Neatly arranged minimalist campsite featuring modern tent, portable stove, backpack, pine forest and rocks background, clear daylight or golden hour light, earthy colors, no people, no visible brand logos or copyrighted designs
packet.negative_prompt: Brand logos, people, text, watermarks, editorial or news scenes, copyrighted gear designs, public figures
packet.technical_specs: Bright natural lighting, sharp details on gear and nature, warm earthy tones

parts.text: Minimalist camping gear with tent, stove, backpack, pine trees and rocks, daylight or golden hour light, earthy tones, no people, no logos

Technical specs: Bright natural lighting, sharp details on gear and nature, warm earthy tones

Stock safety requirements: non-editorial commercial stock image; no real people or public figures; no brands, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, protected product designs, readable text, or watermarks.

Negative prompt: Brand logos, people, text, watermarks, editorial or news scenes, copyrighted gear designs, public figures
